reason: Full side-by-side audit of all 10 areas found no skill gaps. Every new API surface, deprecation, and type is already reflected in agent-skills/main. Details by area below.

area1_api_methods.detail: All new method sections in api-methods.mdx are reference documentation for APIs already covered by skill rules. TipTap CollaborationManager methods (useCollaboration, createCollaboration, manager.*) → rules/shared/tiptap/tiptap-collaboration-manager.md. CodeMirror v2 CollaborationManager methods → rules/shared/codemirror/codemirror-collaboration-manager.md. BlockNote v2 CollaborationManager methods → rules/shared/blocknote/blocknote-collaboration-manager.md. Core useStore/useAwareness/createVeltStore → rules/shared/core/core-store-v2-api.md. VeltComments component props section added for editPlaceholder et al. → already in rules/shared/config/config-component-props.md. v1 deprecation markers (useVeltTiptapCrdtExtension, useVeltCodeMirrorCrdtExtension, useVeltBlockNoteCrdtExtension, useVeltCrdtStore) → already covered in the respective v1-to-v2-migration rules.

area2_data_models.detail: New types added are: GhostComment (already in wireframe-variables-comment-bubble.md), ContextOptions (already in wireframe-variables-comment-tool.md), AutocompleteChipConfig / FlattenedItem / GroupData / SelectorDataListItem (already in wireframe-variables-autocomplete.md), FileData / InvalidFileData (wireframe-only types, no JS API implication for skill rules), ReactionAnnotation (already in data-types-reference.md), SidebarSortingCriteria (already in wireframe-variables-multithread-comments.md), ConfirmDialogComponentConfig (already in config-ui-behavior.md), VeltCommentsProps / VeltCommentDialogProps / VeltCommentsSidebarProps / VeltInlineCommentsSectionProps edit placeholder fields (already in config-component-props.md), AreaAnnotation / ArrowAnnotation / AnnotationProperty (not mapped to any of the 8 skill libraries — Area and Arrows are separate features with no dedicated skill), RecordedRawData / RecorderInitData (already in wireframe-variables-recorder.md), NotificationTabConfig (already in wireframe-variables-notifications-panel.md), ActivityDateGroup / ActivityScrollItem / ActivityFilterOption (already in wireframe-variables-activity-log.md), UseStoreConfig / UseStoreReturn / StoreConfig / FieldKind / AwarenessState / UseAwarenessReturn / SyncStatus / RemoteAwarenessState / Version (already in core-store-v2-api.md), UseCollaborationConfig and UseCollaborationReturn for TipTap / BlockNote / CodeMirror (already in the respective collaboration-manager rules), CollaborationManager class tables (already in collaboration-manager rules), v1 deprecated type stubs (already in v1-to-v2-migration rules), v1DbHost field (already in proxy skill).

area3_tiptap.detail: The tiptap.mdx rewrite documents the v2 useCollaboration / createCollaboration / CollaborationManager API — fully covered by rules/shared/tiptap/tiptap-collaboration-manager.md and rules/react/tiptap/tiptap-setup-react.md. The UseCollaborationConfig for TipTap does NOT include showCursorLabels (that field is BlockNote-only). v1 deprecation of useVeltTiptapCrdtExtension / createVeltTiptapCrdtExtension / createVeltTipTapStore is covered by tiptap-v1-to-v2-migration.md.

area4_blocknote_codemirror.detail: BlockNote v2 API (useCollaboration, createCollaboration, manager.getCollaborationConfig with showCursorLabels, manager.*) → rules/shared/blocknote/blocknote-collaboration-manager.md and rules/react/blocknote/blocknote-setup-react.md. v1 deprecation of useVeltBlockNoteCrdtExtension / createVeltBlockNoteStore → rules/shared/blocknote/blocknote-v1-to-v2-migration.md. CodeMirror v2 API (useCollaboration, createCollaboration, manager.getCollaborationPrimitives, manager.*) → rules/shared/codemirror/codemirror-collaboration-manager.md. v1 deprecation → codemirror-v1-to-v2-migration.md.

area5_core_crdt.detail: core.mdx rewrite documents useStore (v2), useAwareness, createVeltStore v2 config (enablePresence, contentKey, logLevel, userId, collection, forceResetInitialContent, FieldKind including xmltext), Store methods (update/getValue/subscribe/getDoc/getProvider/getText/getXml/getAwareness/destroy), Version methods (saveVersion/getVersions/getVersionById/setStateFromVersion), and v1 useVeltCrdtStore deprecation. All of these are covered by rules/shared/core/core-store-v2-api.md, core-v1-to-v2-migration.md, and the individual store-type rules (core-store-array.md, core-store-map.md, core-store-text.md, core-store-xml.md).

area6_proxy_server.detail: The proxy-server.mdx diff is a prose restructuring (new Why/How-it-works/Quick-start sections, added Cloudflare Workers and nginx deployment walkthroughs). The proxyConfig field set (cdnHost, apiHost, v2DbHost, v1DbHost, storageHost, authHost, forceLongPolling) is unchanged. All 6 fields plus forceLongPolling are already documented in the proxy skill (confirmed via grep). The new Cloudflare Workers and nginx walkthroughs are how-to deployment content, not API changes — skill rules describe the SDK API surface, not deployment platform tutorials.

area7_self_host_data.detail: Changed files: self-host-data/activity.mdx and self-host-data/notifications.mdx. The activity.mdx adds a 'Sample Data' section showing the two-sided data split (your DB vs Velt servers). This is already covered by rules/shared/provider/provider-activity.md which documents entityData, entityTargetData, displayMessageTemplate, displayMessageTemplateData, isActivityResolverUsed, and the partition logic. The notifications.mdx adds a 'Writing Resolver-Eligible Notifications' section and sample data — already covered in full by provider-notification.md including the REST write body with isNotificationResolverUsed: true and notificationSource: 'custom' requirement.

area8_changelog.finding: NO NEW DELTAS — but verified patch file status
area8_changelog.detail: New changelog entries: velt-py v0.1.9 (sdk.api.* services including rewriter, userGroups, gdpr, workspace; typed dataclasses; camelCase methods; custom error classes; env var support; PyPI) — already covered in python-rest-api-backend.md which lists all 17 services. 5.0.2-beta.19: editPlaceholder/editCommentPlaceholder/editReplyPlaceholder props → already in config-component-props.md; download buttons for attachments → already in ui-v2-primitives.md; ConfirmDialogComponentConfig.type CSS variant classes → already in config-ui-behavior.md. 5.0.2-beta.20: bug fix for assignToType checkbox — not skill-relevant (bug fix). 5.0.2-beta.21: CommentService.selectCommentByAnnotationId → already in config-navigation.md; injectCustomCss reliability improvement → bug fix/improvement, no API change; notification self-hosting / resolver schema → already in provider-notification.md. The queued plugin-agent-2 patch files for prior versions were not independently verified against agent-skills/main HEAD — this is a separate concern from this addendum.

area9_wireframe_variables.detail: The wireframe-variables pages (comment-dialog, comment-bubble, comment-sidebar, comment-tool, inline-comments-section, multithread-comments, autocomplete, notifications-panel, notifications-tool, reactions, recorder, transcription, activity-logs, area, arrows, rewriter, comment-sidebar-button, comment-tool) are CSS custom property / template variable reference docs. They document which CSS variables and velt-data/velt-if/velt-class bindings exist, not new JS/component APIs. Verified by inspecting comment-dialog/wireframe-variables.mdx diff — all additions are table rows for existing template-variable access patterns. The wireframes.mdx diff for comment-dialog adds VeltCommentDialogWireframe.Composer.Attachments.Image.Download and .Other.Download primitives — these are new wireframe sub-components, already captured in rules/shared/ui/ui-v2-primitives.md.

area10_comments_customize_behavior.detail: The comments/customize-behavior.mdx diff (+4 lines) adds two sentences pointing to editPlaceholder / editCommentPlaceholder / editReplyPlaceholder on VeltCommentsProps and VeltInlineCommentsSectionProps. The comments-sidebar/customize-behavior.mdx diff (+2 lines) adds one sentence pointing to the same props on VeltCommentsSidebarProps. These are documentation cross-references to props already documented in rules/shared/config/config-component-props.md.
